name: FileResolutionEventArgs
summary: Base class for file resolution related events

properties.name: FileReference
properties.summary: Get file reference to be resolved

properties.name: FileReferenceType
properties.summary: Get type of file reference to be resolved

properties.name: ReferringFileName
properties.summary: Get file name that is referring to file to be resolved, or null if not known

properties.name: ReferringFileNameAsSaved
properties.summary: Get file name that is referring to file to be resolved as it was when saved, or null if not known

properties.name: ResolveToOpen
properties.summary: Get whether file is being resolved in order to open it.
